expectations.text: The skill was invoked (wheel-detector skill was used)
expectations.evidence: Agent read the SKILL.md and followed the three-phase approach (Discover, Match, Report) as instructed

expectations.text: A structured report was generated with findings
expectations.evidence: Report has 7 findings with full structure: File, What it does, Confidence, Migration difficulty, Suggested library, Why replace, Next step

expectations.text: Findings are grouped by confidence level
expectations.evidence: Report organized into sections: High Confidence (2), Medium Confidence (3), Low Confidence (2)

expectations.text: The report includes a summary section
expectations.evidence: Summary section with: 'Candidates found: 7', 'High confidence replacements: 2', 'Medium confidence replacements: 3', 'Low confidence replacements: 2'
